    (SELECT *
     FROM [sys].[objects] o
     WHERE [o].[type] = 'U'
     AND [o].[is_ms_shipped] = 0
     AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT *
         FROM [sys].[extended_properties] AS [ep]
         WHERE [ep].[major_id] = [o].[object_id]
             AND [ep].[minor_id] = 0
             AND [ep].[class] = 1
             AND [ep].[name] = N'microsoft_database_tools_support'
    )
)
SELECT 1 ELSE SELECT 0

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'

    WHERE [e].[Id] = @__id_0 AND [e].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
) AS [s]
LEFT JOIN [Tasks] AS [t] ON [s].[Id] = [t].[AssignedToEmployeeId]
ORDER BY [s].[Id], [s].[Id0]

    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'

SELECT CASE [t].[Status]
    WHEN 0 THEN N'Pending'
    WHEN 1 THEN N'InProgress'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Completed'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Cancelled'
    ELSE CAST([t].[Status] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Status], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Tasks] AS [t]
GROUP BY [t].[Status]
